prompt: Cutoff opened and hero is on the button with KJs. Which simple action fits best at the checkpoint when pressure reaches you?
why_v1: Once the pot is opened in front of you, a playable hand like KJs continues most cleanly by calling rather than acting first-in.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Once the cutoff opens first, KJs on the button is no longer a clean first-in raise, so the simple continue is call.
